case_title: COATS PLUMBING, INC. VS. MIDSTATE CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF COATS PLUMBING, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-14-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-16-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COATS PLUMBING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MIDSTATE CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 35, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-14-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-11-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2021
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-27-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100132268)
